claims.claim: The `TraceIndex` builds the following in-memory structures during load: - Session-grouped event lists - Event-type index - Tool-name index - Agent-name index - Error event sample list - Slow operation list (sorted by duration) - Token total accumulator All structures are built in a single pass over the NDJSON input.
